DATE OF SERVICE: 01/15/2024

CHIEF COMPLAINT: Patient presents with pain in lower right quadrant, tooth #30.

CLINICAL NOTES:
Patient John Smith reports intermittent pain for 2 weeks. Periapical radiograph of tooth #30 shows periapical radiolucency consistent with chronic apical periodontitis. Recommended root canal therapy (CDT D3330). Patient's insurance (Delta Dental, Member ID: DDI-98765432) verified for coverage. Co-pay estimated at $150.

TREATMENT PLAN:
- D3330 Root canal therapy, molar
- D2750 Crown, porcelain fused to high noble metal (follow-up)

Patient agreed to treatment plan. Consent form signed.
Next appointment: 01/22/2024 at 2:30 PM
